title: Class 4 Driver / Truck Driver
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $3000 - $3500 + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: Islandwide (Company office at Tampines)
  • Working day: Monday to Friday (Normal Working Hours)


Job Responsibilities:

  • To observe instruction/direction from Superior/Company strictly in transporting items/equipment: proper packaging of items in safe and secured manner, strict timeline compliance, location, items & etc
  • Plan and coordinate transportation and delivery of goods to internal and external customers, ensuring timely deliveries and efficient routes
  • Maintain and update delivery schedules, ensuring products are delivered on time
  • To be responsible in loading and unloading of items/equipment
  • To be responsible for safety and full accountability of items delivered with proper documentation
  • To ensure safety and full accountability of items delivered with proper documentation
  • Oversee daily warehouse operations including receiving, storing, and dispatching goods
  • Ensure goods are properly labelled, stored, and protected to prevent damage
  • Monitor inventory levels, perform regular stock checks, and maintain accurate records in warehouse management systems
  • Ensure warehouse complies with health, safety, and environmental regulations
  • Maintain a clean and organized warehouse, minimizing hazards and ensuring safe work environments
  • Adhere to safety procedures, equipment handling, and best practices


Job Requirements:

  • Possess valid Class 4 Driving License


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume


  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

postedCompany.description:
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
postedCompany.name: EA RECRUITMENT PTE. LTD.
